Hyperswarm makes peer discovery trivially simple. Join a topic, find peers, exchange data. No servers required.

## Getting Started

1. Create a swarm instance
2. Join a topic hash
3. Handle incoming connections
4. Replicate your data structures

The beauty is in the simplicity.
